member.name: T:HumanFortress.WorldGen.FortressGenerator
member.summary: Minimal fortress generator (rolled back): - Heightmap from world tile elevation + simple noise - Surface by biome (grass/sand/snow/mud/granite_floor) - Below surface: granite wall - Above surface: air

member.name: T:HumanFortress.WorldGen.FortressMap
member.summary: Represents the generated fortress map data. Uses geology handles directly instead of TerrainType enum.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.WorldGen.FortressChunk
member.summary: Represents a single chunk in the fortress map. Now stores geology handles directly instead of TerrainType enum.
